### Cool Stuff & Try This
**[Gemini vs. Claude: Which AI Wins at Real-Life Tasks?]: Latest from Tom's Guide**  
This story tests two free AI chatbots — Gemini 3 Flash (Google's quick-thinking assistant that's great for fast answers) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic's thoughtful model that's like a wise friend for planning and creating) — on everyday prompts like reasoning out a puzzle, planning a trip, or writing a story. sections.quick_bits:
### Quick Bits
**[AI Tests Miss Most Jobs — Time for a Fix?]**  
A new study reveals that tests for AI agents — those smart digital helpers that can chain tasks together — are way too focused on coding, covering only about 8% of US jobs while ignoring stuff like healthcare or retail. This is interesting because it means AI might get amazing at programming but struggle with real-world careers you might be eyeing, like art or teaching — it's a wake-up call to make AI more balanced and useful for e
